snippet: Fabio Giglietto co-authored a white paper exploring how the Digital Services Act (DSA) is transforming data access for platform research. He is also involved in the vera.ai project, which aims to develop AI-based methods to assist verification professionals in content verification.
description: This news item from the University of Urbino Carlo Bo highlights Fabio Giglietto's involvement in research related to the Digital Services Act (DSA) and the vera.ai project, both focusing on platform research and content verification.

title: Advancing Research on Disinformation and Digital Manipulation: The University of Urbino at two Key Conferences in Brazil – vera.ai VERification Assisted by Artificial Intelligence
snippet: Professor Fabio Giglietto presented collaborative research on analyzing political discourse using large language models (LLMs) to examine political talk in hyperpartisan Facebook groups. He also moderated a roundtable discussion on data access in the Digital Services Act (DSA) era.
description: This article discusses Professor Fabio Giglietto's presentation of collaborative research on political discourse analysis using LLMs at conferences in Brazil, as well as his moderation of a roundtable on data access in the DSA era. The article focuses on his academic work in social media and political analysis.
